weaknesses: Failed to perform any actual suturing or knot tying
Did not enter the trainer box to begin the task
Only completed setup phase without task execution

drills.name: Basic suturing initiation drill
drills.description: Practice entering the trainer box and completing one full needle pass through the Penrose drain before any knot tying attempts.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to perform any actual suturing or knot tying.

drills.name: Setup-to-execution transition
drills.description: Time yourself completing setup in under 30 seconds, then immediately begin the first needle pass without hesitation.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not enter the trainer box to begin the task.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, you should be moving beyond setup into consistent task execution. Focus on transitioning from preparation to active suturing within the first minute of your session.
